topic: fzf - fuzzy finder for instant file navigation
caption:
I used to hunt files for minutes. Now it takes 2 keystrokes.

fzf is a fuzzy finder that turns file navigation into a search bar. Press Ctrl+T, type part of the name, and open instantly. No more click
